hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == */.env || "$f" == */.env.* ]]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Bloqué : modification des fichiers .env interdite"}'; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *pnpm-lock.yaml || "$f" == *package-lock.json || "$f" == *yarn.lock ]]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Bloqué : édition directe du lock file interdite — utilise pnpm install"}'; exit 2; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx ]] || exit 0; [[ "$f" == */backend/* ]] && DIR=backend || DIR=frontend; cd /Users/alexandreremaud/Work/latableedecarole/$DIR && pnpm exec prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx ]] || exit 0; [[ "$f" == */backend/* ]] && DIR=backend || DIR=frontend; cd /Users/alexandreremaud/Work/latableedecarole/$DIR && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx ]] || exit 0; [[ "$f" == */backend/* ]] && DIR=backend || DIR=frontend; cd /Users/alexandreremaud/Work/latableedecarole/$DIR && pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.ts || "$f" == *.tsx ]] || exit 0; [[ "$f" == */backend/* ]] && DIR=backend || DIR=frontend; cd /Users/alexandreremaud/Work/latableedecarole/$DIR && pnpm test 2>&1 | tail -10 || true; }
